login.title: Login to Reliquary

login.registerLink: No token? Register with Invite Code
login.errorToken: Invalid token or user not found
login.loginLink: Have a token? Back to Login
login.inviteCodeHint: Default code includes a 24-hour free trial. Your data will be wiped after. Replace this if you have a private code.
login.successDesc: Your account has been created successfully.

success.step1Desc: This is your only login credential. It will not be shown again, please save it securely.
success.step2Desc: The server is ready. Now you need to install the local client.
success.step3Desc: After logging into the client, you will need to configure an OpenAI compatible API Key to start using voice features.
success.enterSystem: I have saved it, enter system
success.copyModalDesc: This token is only shown once. If lost, you cannot recover your account. We strongly recommend copying it now.

login.tokenWarning: Please save this token securely. You won't be able to see it again.

history.confirmClearDayDesc: This will permanently delete all records and audio files for this day. This action cannot be undone.

pipelineConfig.title: Pipeline Config
pipelineConfig.subtitle: Customize keywords and prompts for each pipeline step
pipelineConfig.keywordsDesc: One word per line, max 10. Add words that are frequently misrecognized. Spaces, commas, or newlines all work.
pipelineConfig.userPromptDesc: Additional correction rules for this step.
pipelineConfig.userPromptPlaceholder:
e.g. Do not use dashes or ellipses
Do not change the meaning of the original text

hero.title:
Frictionless Voice
for AI Superusers
hero.quote1: Do you want to communicate with AI in the most efficient way possible?
hero.quote2: Do you want to completely outsource those tedious, unimportant mental chores?
hero.quote3: Do you want AI to become your most understanding companion?
hero.desc: Talk to AI with your most chaotic thoughts. Reliquary scrubs the mess and drops input friction to zero, letting you focus entirely on deep logical sparring with LLMs.

painPoints.title: Why Reinvent the Wheel?
painPoints.subtitle: Mainstream voice tools are simply not designed for "thinking".

items.title: Aggressive Cutoffs & Pressure
items.desc: Pause for a second, and the system forcefully truncates and replies. You're forced into a breathless "rapid-fire" mode that breaks your train of thought, pollutes context, and induces extreme psychological pressure.

items.title: Free Garbage or Expensive Wrappers
items.desc: Free tools fail miserably at technical jargon and mixed languages. The good paid solutions are often just expensive AI wrappers, unworthy of their exorbitant mandatory monthly subscriptions.

items.title: One Error, And It's All Gone
items.desc: After rambling on for minutes, a single network blip or API timeout evaporates hundreds of words of inspiration. You can't even remember what you just said, leading to complete frustration.

items.title: Locked-In Data & Zero Ownership
items.desc: Why should your high-frequency private thoughts be locked in someone else's cloud? Inability to freely export data means losing the chance to build a personal knowledge base. Your data is yours, not big tech's training corpus.

solution.title:
What happens when you drop
interaction friction to zero?
solution.subtitle: Traditional tools force you to adapt to the machine. Reliquary makes the machine adapt to your intuition.

items.title: Your rambling and incoherence are the best Prompts
items.desc: No need to perfectly organize your sentences beforehand. You don't have to weigh every word or craft the perfect "prompt." Say whatever comes to mind, however it comes to mind. Ramble, repeat yourself, even contradict yourself. Your rambling actually helps the AI pinpoint what matters most. Just dump all your messy thoughts, and let the AI handle the grunt work of distilling, structuring, and executing.

items.title: Outsource the Overthinking, Stop Wasting Brainpower on Trivia
items.desc: Daily energy is finite. Don't waste it comparison shopping or handling tedious chores. Buying something and tired of reading specs? Take a photo, ramble about your preferences, concerns, and dilemmas, and let it do the initial filtering and comparison for you. You don't have to follow its decision blindly, but this mental outsourcing saves you hours of research and hesitation, leaving your brain to only handle the final sign-off. Mainstream voice assistants can't do this; in their pursuit of "real-time conversation," they are forced to use underpowered small models that simply cannot handle deep logical reasoning.

items.title: A venting outlet that gets you, and a partner to stop your overthinking
items.desc: When dealing with workplace drama or frustrating situations, you can naturally vent to it. But unlike friends who just blindly agree with you, it has your long-term data and understands your context. It won't just listen to your complaints—it performs psychological and behavioral analysis based on objective facts: telling you why the other person did what they did, and whether you are actually at fault. It uses absolute rationality to peel away emotion, reducing unnecessary self-doubt and internal turmoil, getting you back on track to solving the actual problem faster. Reliquary can help you build detailed behavioral profiles of the people in your life. As data accumulates, it builds an objectively rational mirror based on your data, drastically reducing the context you need to explain next time.

items.title: "Zero Loss" of Inspiration for Complete Peace of Mind
items.desc: The biggest pain point of voice input isn't the act of speaking; it's the constant anxiety of data loss. The more you talk, the more devastating it feels when a network blip or app crash instantly evaporates a ten-minute monologue. Reliquary performs physical-level streaming backups locally. Even if you lose internet mid-sentence, your fleeting inspiration is securely captured, completely eliminating the fear of your efforts going down the drain.

cta.title: Stop Meaningless Friction
cta.desc: Stop wasting energy typing and fixing typos. Give expression back to your voice, and leave the structuring to the AI.
cta.disclaimer1: Non-profit Test Node: Provided solely to lower the initial barrier to entry; not for commercial use.
cta.disclaimer2: Your trial account and all generated data will be physically and permanently destroyed 24 hours after registration.
cta.disclaimer3: For long-term use, please follow the guide to deploy your own dedicated backend.

deployment.title: Get Started
deployment.subtitle: Choose your preferred deployment method. We also provide a one-click trial environment.

client.mac: Installation via Homebrew is recommended. We automatically handle audio permissions:
client.mac_usage: Launch the client from your terminal. The initial setup will guide you:
client.mac_usage_step2: Enter Access Token (Generated in the backend dashboard)
client.win: On Windows, Scoop provides the cleanest installation experience:
client.android: Not available on Google Play yet. Please install by sideloading the APK:
client.android_steps:
Enable 'Install from Unknown Sources'
Download and install the latest APK
client.linux: Linux version coming soon. Stay tuned.
client.ios: The iOS client is under intensive development. Keep an eye on the repo.
client.pending: Feature under development. Please watch our GitHub repository for updates.

server.docker: Ideal for a quick start, testing, and daily personal use.
server.prod: Strongly recommended for public exposure. The built-in Caddy server automatically provisions and renews SSL certificates.
server.prod_edit: Fill in your actual domain and modify keys/environment variables as needed.
server.trial: No deployment needed. Data will be automatically destroyed after 24 hours.

trial.title: Trial Only, Zero Retention
trial.desc: We do not offer commercial services. This trial exists solely to lower the barrier to entry and save you the initial deployment hassle.
trial.warning: Your account and all generated voice/text data will be permanently and irreversibly wiped 24 hours after registration.

deployment.groqWarning: Note: You must configure your Groq API Key in the backend settings to enable core transcription and Fixer capabilities.
